case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ROBERTSON, CHRISTOPHER

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, CHRISTOPHER
